description_long: This is a compact, modern toaster with a sleek, rounded rectangular body finished in a glossy black color. The front face features a control panel with several buttons and a lever, likely for adjusting toasting settings and lowering bread into the slots. The top surface has two wide, parallel toast slots with metallic trim, suitable for standard slices of bread. The sides are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing the minimalist design, while the back is similarly plain except for a small protruding knob, possibly for additional control or cord management. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of plastic and metal materials, and the toaster is designed to sit securely on a countertop. No visible brand logo or power cord is present in the images.
description: A sleek, black, modern toaster with two metallic toast slots and a front control panel featuring buttons and a lever.
description_view_0: Front view showing the control panel with buttons, a lever, and the two toast slots on top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a smooth, unadorned black surface with no visible controls or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain black surface with no visible controls, slots, or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view with a smooth surface and a small protruding knob near the bottom rear.
attribute_control_knobs: One small round knob on the lower right side, black in color, with no visible markings.
attribute_toast_slots: Two wide, rectangular toast slots on the top, spaced evenly with metallic trim.
